calendar.matters:
Petitioner Helen D'Vorah Simmons Petition Of Orders: 1) Compelling Production Of Documents And Information ...Et Al
Off Calendar Mar-13-2019 Off Calendar

Petition For Instructions For Approval Of Settlement Agreement And To Terminate The Trust
Off Calendar Mar-20-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: George Benetatos for and with Helen Simmons.
James Braden for and with Marilyn Saner (Respondent).
Roberta Economidis for Marlisa Simmons Cook (Beneficiary).

Mr. Braden stated that he waives direct notice to his Client. The Court stated that it does not have page three of the operative trust and that it is unable to determine if everyone who is entitled to notice has received notice. Mr. Benetatos stated that all parties received the entire trust including page three and asked the Court not to request anything further. The Court informed Counsel that he needs to get it filed. Mr. Benetatos stated that he will file an entire copy of the 2013 Trust and provided a proposed order. The Court noted that no one is here to oppose this. The Petition for Instructions for Approval or Settlement Agreement and to Terminate Trust is under submission. Mr. Benetatos is to get his supplement filed promptly. The Petition for Order Compelling Production of Documents and Information, etc. is off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
